evidence_refs.quote: We evaluate the feasibility of a "scaffold-only revision" mode: a constrained code repair pass that may edit imports, exported names, CLI adapters, wrappers, and other non-core glue, but must provably leave core algorithm text unchanged. Enforcement relies on `# CORE_START` / `# CORE_END` sentinel markers and SHA-256 hash equality checks over the protected region.
